un.caen.model.items

Class Energy

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.model.items.Item
      • un.caen.model.items.Energy

  • public class Energy
extends Item
    Represents an energy item in the game. This item can be collected by players to restore energy.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Item

        id, ItemCount, position, visible

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Energy(Position position)
      Constructs an Energy item at the specified position.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Energy

        public Energy(Position position)
        Constructs an Energy item at the specified position.
        Parameters:
        position - the Position where the energy item is located
